description: FALSIFICATION TRACKER (ADR-0006) for the standing meta-finding that long-only price patterns are dead post-2024. This is the ONLY cell that survived the H6 design grid on 2024+ data (sma480 cross, long leg: PF 1.24, +15.5% on 202 trades) - observed on heavily mined design data and therefore presumed to be selection noise. Its forward record decides. Registered at the M14 expansion; multiplicity recorded in the candidate ledger.

tracking.prediction: PREDICTED TO UNDERPERFORM the benchmark-btc-hold control net of costs: the H6 design cell it comes from is presumed mined noise from the long-only family (four signed failures + the 7-investigation meta-finding). If its forward record instead clearly BEATS the benchmark over >=6 months, the meta-finding is falsified and the trend family reopens for fresh pre-registered design on unmined data.
